info.name: Own Chatbot Agent
info.description: Postman collection for the Own Chatbot Agent backend API.

body.raw:
{
  "businessType": "saas",
  "projectName": "Acme Support Bot",
  "websiteUrl": "https://example.com",
  "mainGoal": "answer product questions and collect leads",
  "targetAudience": "website visitors",
  "tone": "clear, technical, and support-friendly",
  "capturesName": "yes",
  "capturesEmail": "yes",
  "capturesPhone": "no",
  "uploadedDocs": "website pages, FAQ, pricing, docs",
  "allowedTopics": "pricing, features, onboarding, support",
  "blockedTopics": "legal advice, medical diagnosis, financial guarantees",
  "handoffReason": "when the bot is uncertain or the user requests a human"
}

{
  "profile": {
    "projectName": "Acme Support Bot",
    "businessType": "SaaS",
    "websiteUrl": "https://example.com",
    "websiteTitle": "Example",
    "websiteSummary": "Example summary",
    "websitePages": [],
    "websiteSections": [],
    "websiteChunks": [],
    "websiteTopics": [],
    "tone": "clear, technical, and support-friendly",
    "goals": ["answer product questions", "qualify leads", "support onboarding"],
    "targetAudience": "website visitors",
    "knowledgeSources": ["Website: https://example.com"],
    "leadCaptureFields": ["name", "email"],
    "handoffConditions": ["The bot is uncertain about the answer."],
    "allowedTopics": ["pricing", "features", "support"],
    "blockedTopics": ["legal advice", "medical diagnosis"],
    "prompt": "You are the AI chatbot for Acme Support Bot."
  }
}
